issue: The catalog still says every state record is either `agent-improvement` or `model-benchmark`, omitting the new `skill-benchmark` lane.
fix: Update the mode list to include `mode: skill-benchmark` or narrow the sentence to Lane B records only.

issue: The skill-benchmark scoring summary says D1 inter+intra are scored without labeling D1-inter as built-but-opt-in/off by default, while the command doc correctly marks it opt-in.
fix: Qualify D1-inter as enabled only via `--advisor-mode=python`, with default Mode A scoring D1-intra, D2, D3, and D5.

issue: The root containment check uses plain startsWith, so a routed ../deep-improvement-sibling/... path can resolve outside the skill root while still sharing the same string prefix.
fix: Compare path.relative(root, resolved) and reject paths that start with .. or are absolute.

issue: The orchestrator returns before scanConnectivity, so the remediated missing-SKILL.md D5 score of 60 is never surfaced in the normal Lane C report path.
fix: Remove this pre-D5 return and let scanConnectivity produce the gated report.

issue: The frontmatter closes without the requested `type:` or `status:` keys; `contextType: reference` is present but does not satisfy a literal title/type/status convention.
fix: Add `type` and `status` fields before the closing frontmatter delimiter.

issue: The frontmatter closes without the requested `type:` or `status:` keys; the doc otherwise has `title` and `## 1. OVERVIEW`.
fix: Add `type` and `status` fields before the closing frontmatter delimiter.

issue: The frontmatter closes without the requested `type:` or `status:` keys; the doc otherwise has `title` and `## 1. OVERVIEW`.
fix: Add `type` and `status` fields before the closing frontmatter delimiter.

issue: Parent graph metadata still reports derived.status as planned, while the parent spec and child graph metadata mark the packet/phases complete.
fix: Regenerate or patch parent graph-metadata.json so derived.status is complete.

issue: The parent spec frontmatter still maps rename/build/docs to phases 002/003/004, but the current phase table uses 003/004/005.
fix: Update the description to match the current phase numbering.

issue: The catalog says Lane C weights live in default_profile.json, but the scorer hardcodes WEIGHTS and default_profile.json says it is not yet consumed.
fix: State that weights are hardcoded today and the profile is forward-looking.

issue: The header comment still lists D1-inter advisor scoring as follow-on, while the implementation supports opt-in --advisor-mode=python.
fix: Remove D1-inter from the follow-on list and leave only live dispatch/trace plus D4 ablation.

issue: The severity summary says 0 P0 / 4 P1 / 6 P2, but the same report says all 11 findings were applied and lists F-01 through F-11.
fix: Reconcile the count by updating the summary or merging/removing the extra registry item.
